creator: Alexander Terp
description: save_state currently writes via os.WriteFile directly to the target path (core/home_stash.go -> com.CreateFilePathAndWriteJson) - a crash or concurrent writer can corrupt state. Write to a temp file in the same dir and rename over the target. Cheap, no API change. From #139 (remind has three concurrent writer paths). The opt-in advisory-lock half of that note is tracked separately pending discussion.
title: Make save_state atomic (write tmp + rename)
